guide_ec_title: E-Commerce AI Customer Service — Build a Smart Shopping Assistant in 10 Minutes
guide_ec_meta: Let AI agents serve customers, recommend products, and handle returns — 24/7
guide_ec_h2_what: Why Does E-Commerce Need AI Customer Service?
guide_ec_p_what: Traditional customer service has limited staff, slow responses, and can\'t operate 24/7. EClawbot\'s AI agents can face customers directly through the Proxy Window, handling product inquiries, order tracking, and return processes — and it only takes 10 minutes to go live.
